# Items
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Items&prop=wikitext

One of the main appeals of ROTF is improving your gear as you progress. Each item is there to help the player progress through the game in a balanced way so he ends up feeling powerful after going through the effort of getting that strong items. All items have a rarity/speciality. If you wear a complete set of artifact items (not any set works, only specific sets like the Geb's priest set) all your stats get +5, except HP and MP that get +50. Primal and legendary items have special passive abilities that go from giving you boosts when you have them equipped to triggering a life-saving heal in a dangerous situation. Learn more about [https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/wiki/Artifact_Sets Artifact Sets] and [https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/wiki/Item_Effects Item Effects] clicking in the words.

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Items</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Weapons</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Bows.png
| link = Bows
| text = Bows
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Daggers.png
| link = Daggers
| text = Daggers
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Staves.png
| link = Staves
| text = Staves
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Wands.png
| link = Wands
| text = Wands
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Swords.png
| link = Swords
| text = Swords
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Katanas.png
| link = Katanas
| text = Katanas
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Abilities</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Spells.png
| link = Spells
| text = Spells
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Quivers.png
| link = Quivers
| text = Quivers
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Shields.png
| link = Shields
| text = Shields
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Seals.png
| link = Seals
| text = Seals
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Helmets.png
| link = Helmets
| text = Helmets
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Prisms.png
| link = Prisms
| text = Prisms
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Tomes.png
| link = Tomes
| text = Tomes
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Scepters.png
| link = Scepters
| text = Scepters
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Traps.png
| link = Traps
| text = Traps
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Orbs.png
| link = Orbs
| text = Orbs
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Skulls.png
| link = Skulls
| text = Skulls
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Poisons.png
| link = Poisons
| text = Poisons
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Cloaks.png
| link = Cloaks
| text = Cloaks
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Stars.png
| link = Stars
| text = Stars
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Armors</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HeavyArmors.png
| link = Heavy Armors
| text = Heavy Armors
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = LeatherArmors.png
| link = Leather Armors
| text = Leather Armors
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Robes.png
| link = Robes
| text = Robes
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Rings</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = Rings.png
| link = Rings
| text = Rings
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">
Consumables
</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Consumables.png
| link = Consumables
| text = Consumables
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
